    SshIdentity
    SshDomainAPI.authorizeHost(SshIdentity identity, SshHost host)
    Registers a host as authorized for the given identity, returning the updated identity.
    SshIdentity
    SshDomainAPI.deauthorizeHost(SshIdentity identity, SshHost host)
    Deauthorizes a host from the given identity, returning the updated identity.
    static SshException
    SshException.hostAlreadyAuthorized(SshIdentity identity, SshHost host)

    SshException.hostNotAuthorized(SshIdentity identity, SshHost host)
     
    default boolean
    SshIdentity.isAuthorizedOn(SshHost host)
    True if this identity's public key has been installed on the given host.
    static SshException
    SshException.passphraseRequired(SshHost host)
     
    default SshIdentity
    SshIdentity.withAuthorizedHost(SshHost host)
    Returns a new SshIdentity with the given host added to the authorized list.
    default SshIdentity
    SshIdentity.withoutAuthorizedHost(SshHost host)
    Returns a new SshIdentity with the given host removed from the authorized list.
